subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of the All-Merciful! Render praise unto God for that, in this blessed age and wondrous century, the Most Great Name [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی حمد کنید خدا را که در چنین عصر مبارک و قرن بدیع اسم اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
